iterations.theme: Uloga umjetne inteligencije u katoličkom obrazovanju: Prilike, izazovi i primat ljudske formacije

sections.subtitle: Spasenje Duša: Temeljna Misija Katoličkog Obrazovanja
sections.screenshot_description: Oče Ambrose objašnjava primarni cilj katoličkog obrazovanja.
sections.content: Oče Ambrose, istaknuti govornik na forumu Builders AI, započinje raspravu naglašavajući da je srž katoličkog obrazovanja **spasenje duša** – kako učenika, tako i učitelja i administratora. Prema njegovim riječima, misija Crkve je 'naseliti Kraljevstvo neba ljudima koji su spašeni u Isusu Kristu'. Sve ostalo, poput učenja matematike, znanosti, upisa na dobar fakultet ili pronalaska dobrog posla, podređeno je tom vrhovnom cilju. Oče Ambrose jasno postavlja kriterij za prihvatljivost umjetne inteligencije (AI) u obrazovanju: ako AI služi kao pozitivan alat za autentičnu kršćansku ljudsku formaciju, onda je dobrodošla. Međutim, ako ometa taj cilj ili promiče mehanistički, 'pruski model' proizvodnje 'robota u tvornici', treba je odbaciti.
sections.subtitle_en: Salvation of Souls: The Fundamental Mission of Catholic Education
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Ambrose explains the primary goal of Catholic education.
sections.content_en: Father Ambrose, a prominent speaker at the Builders AI forum, begins the discussion by emphasizing that the core of Catholic education is the **salvation of souls** – of students, as well as teachers and administrators. According to his words, the mission of the Church is 'to populate the Kingdom of Heaven with people who are saved in Jesus Christ'. Everything else, such as learning mathematics, science, enrolling in a good college, or finding a good job, is subordinate to that supreme goal. Father Ambrose clearly sets the criterion for the acceptability of artificial intelligence (AI) in education: if AI serves as a positive tool for authentic Christian human formation, then it is welcome. However, if it hinders that goal or promotes a mechanistic, 'Prussian model' of producing 'robots in a factory', it should be rejected.

sections.subtitle: Institut Evermode i AI u Obrazovanju: Obnova Katoličkih Škola
sections.screenshot_description: Ben uvodi temu AI-ja u obrazovanju i rad Instituta Evermode.
sections.content: Ben, voditelj razgovora, uvodi temu umjetne inteligencije u obrazovanju i rad Instituta Evermode, s kojim Oče Ambrose surađuje. Oče Ambrose objašnjava da Institut razvija online kurikulum za podučavanje vjere katoličkim nastavnicima i administratorima. On opisuje trenutno stanje katoličkog školskog sustava u Americi kao 'katastrofu' kojoj je potrebna obnova, posebno u katehetskoj formaciji fakulteta i administracije. Upravo u tom kontekstu Institut Evermode koristi umjetnu inteligenciju.
sections.subtitle_en: Institut Evermode and AI in Education: Renewal of Catholic Schools
sections.screenshot_description_en: Ben introduces the topic of AI in education and the work of the Evermode Institute.
sections.content_en: Ben, the host of the conversation, introduces the topic of artificial intelligence in education and the work of the Evermode Institute, with which Father Ambrose collaborates. Father Ambrose explains that the Institute is developing an online curriculum for teaching the faith to Catholic teachers and administrators. He describes the current state of the Catholic school system in America as a 'catastrophe' that needs renewal, especially in the catechetical formation of faculty and administration. It is precisely in this context that the Evermode Institute uses artificial intelligence.

sections.subtitle: Praktična Primjena AI: Od Razvoja Platformi do Kreiranja Sadržaja
sections.screenshot_description: Oče Ambrose detaljno objašnjava kako AI pomaže u razvoju kurikuluma.
sections.content: Oče Ambrose detaljno opisuje praktične, tehničke primjene umjetne inteligencije u radu Instituta Evermode. Njegovi programeri, koji su se sami obučavali koristeći dostupnu AI tehnologiju, razvili su online platformu. AI se također koristi za pomoć timu u stvaranju tekstova i scenarija za katehetski kurikulum. Iako naglašava da je uvijek potreban 'ljudski dodir' i da se sadržaj ne koristi 'samo s police', AI služi kao iznimno uspješan istraživački alat ili 'biblioteka' koja omogućuje svećeniku i njegovom timu da pripreme materijale za njegov rad.
sections.subtitle_en: Practical Application of AI: From Platform Development to Content Creation
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Ambrose explains in detail how AI helps in the development of the curriculum.
sections.content_en: Father Ambrose describes in detail the practical, technical applications of artificial intelligence in the work of the Evermode Institute. His programmers, who trained themselves using available AI technology, developed an online platform. AI is also used to help the team in creating texts and scripts for the catechetical curriculum. Although he emphasizes that a 'human touch' is always needed and that content is not used 'just off the shelf', AI serves as an extremely successful research tool or 'library' which enables the priest and his team to prepare materials for his work.

sections.subtitle: Budući Potencijal AI: Prevođenje Kurikuluma i Usavršavanje Alata
sections.screenshot_description: Oče Ambrose govori o budućim mogućnostima AI-ja, poput prevođenja.
sections.content: Gledajući u budućnost, Oče Ambrose vidi značajan potencijal za umjetnu inteligenciju, posebno u prevođenju kurikuluma. Navodi primjer nadbiskupije s velikom španjolskom populacijom, gdje postoji potreba za kurikulumom na španjolskom jeziku. Uz pomoć AI-ja, on i njegov tim planiraju prevesti sav snimljeni sadržaj i generirati transkripte na različitim jezicima. Ističe kako AI tehnologija može pomoći u 'usavršavanju, izoštravanju i oštrenju instrumenata' koje su već stvorili, čineći obrazovne alate još učinkovitijima.
sections.subtitle_en: Future Potential of AI: Translating Curriculum and Refining Tools
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Ambrose speaks about the future possibilities of AI, such as translation.
sections.content_en: Looking into the future, Father Ambrose sees significant potential for artificial intelligence, especially in the translation of the curriculum. He cites an example of an archdiocese with a large Spanish population, where there is a need for a curriculum in the Spanish language. With the help of AI, he and his team plan to translate all recorded content and generate transcripts in different languages. He points out how AI technology can help in 'perfecting, sharpening, and honing the instruments' that they have already created, making educational tools even more effective.

sections.subtitle: Kritika Modernog Obrazovanja: Utilitaristički Model naspram Ljudske Formacije
sections.screenshot_description: Oče Ambrose kritizira utilitaristički pristup modernom obrazovanju.
sections.content: Ben postavlja pitanje o širem kontekstu katoličkog obrazovanja i potrebi za promjenom. Oče Ambrose iznosi oštru kritiku modernog obrazovanja, posebno u Americi i na Zapadu, opisujući ga kao 'Deweyev model' s vrlo utilitarističkim pristupom. Ovaj model, objašnjava, svodi se na ciklus 'dobra ocjena, dobar fakultet, dobar posao, mnogo novca', što naziva 'kapitalizmom' i 'industrijskom revolucijom' primijenjenom na obrazovanje. On to uspoređuje s 'proizvodnjom u tvornici', čiji korijeni sežu do pruskih vojnih modela, gdje studenti sjede u redovima i zvona označavaju promjene, sve s ciljem stvaranja 'utilitarističkih robota' za kapitalističku kulturu. Oče Ambrose naglašava da to nije ljudski, već je potrebno vratiti se razumijevanju formacije osobe, katoličkog obrazovanja i vrlina, kako bi se ljude oblikovalo za sretan i plodonosan život, a za kršćane, život milosti.
sections.subtitle_en: Critique of Modern Education: Utilitarian Model versus Human Formation
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Ambrose criticizes the utilitarian approach to modern education.
sections.content_en: Ben asks a question about the broader context of Catholic education and the need for change. Father Ambrose presents a sharp critique of modern education, especially in America and the West, describing it as the 'Dewey model' with a very utilitarian approach. This model, he explains, boils down to a cycle of 'good grade, good college, good job, a lot of money', which he calls 'capitalism' and the 'industrial revolution' applied to education. He compares it to 'factory production', whose roots go back to Prussian military models, where students sit in rows and bells mark changes, all with the goal of creating 'utilitarian robots' for a capitalist culture. Father Ambrose emphasizes that this is not human, but it is necessary to return to an understanding of the formation of the person, Catholic education, and virtues, in order to shape people for a happy and fruitful life, and for Christians, a life of grace.

sections.subtitle: AI i Spasenje Duša: Granice i Odgovornost
sections.screenshot_description: Oče Ambrose ponovno ističe primarni cilj katoličkog obrazovanja.
sections.content: Oče Ambrose ponovno naglašava da je katoličko obrazovanje prvenstveno usmjereno na spasenje duša učenika, učitelja i administratora, što je temeljna misija Crkve. U tom kontekstu, umjetna inteligencija je prihvatljiva samo ako služi kao pozitivan alat za 'stvarnu, autentičnu kršćansku ljudsku formaciju'. Ako pak AI ometa taj cilj ili promiče mehanistički model 'proizvodnje tvorničkih robota', treba je odbaciti. On ističe ulogu nastavnika u učionici da prepoznaju i primijene ovu razliku.
sections.subtitle_en: AI and the Salvation of Souls: Limits and Responsibility
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Ambrose again emphasizes the primary goal of Catholic education.
sections.content_en: Father Ambrose emphasizes again that Catholic education is primarily directed toward the salvation of the souls of students, teachers, and administrators, which is the fundamental mission of the Church. In this context, artificial intelligence is acceptable only if it serves as a positive tool for 'real, authentic Christian human formation'. If, however, AI hinders that goal or promotes a mechanistic model of 'production of factory robots', it should be rejected. He emphasizes the role of teachers in the classroom to recognize and apply this difference.

sections.subtitle: Opasnosti Prevelike Ovisnosti o Tehnologiji i Gubitak Mentalnog Istraživanja
sections.screenshot_description: Oče Ambrose izražava zabrinutost zbog prekomjernog vremena pred ekranom kod mladih.
sections.content: Oče Ambrose izražava duboku zabrinutost zbog utjecaja tehnologije na mlade. Smatra da je 'devastirajuće' za mlade ljude da su stalno pred ekranima. Idealno bi, prema njegovom mišljenju, dijete u katoličkoj obitelji trebalo biti bez ekrana do dvanaeste ili petnaeste godine, a bez pristupa internetu ili mobitelu do osamnaeste. Iako priznaje da je to teško ostvarivo u Sjevernoj Americi, upozorava na opasnost iluzije znanja kada se 'mentalno istraživanje' prepušta strojevima. To predstavlja značajan teorijski izazov za obrazovanje.
sections.subtitle_en: Dangers of Excessive Dependence on Technology and the Loss of Mental Exploration
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Ambrose expresses concern because of excessive screen time among the youth.
sections.content_en: Oče Ambrose expresses deep concern because of the influence of technology on the youth. He considers that it is 'devastating' for young people to be constantly in front of screens. Ideally, according to his opinion, a child in a Catholic family should be without screens until the twelfth or fifteenth year, and without access to the internet or a mobile phone until the eighteenth. Although he admits that this is difficult to achieve in Sjeverna Amerika, he warns of the danger of the illusion of knowledge when 'mental research' is left to machines. This represents a significant theoretical challenge for education.

sections.subtitle: Moralna Neutralnost AI i Etičke Implikacije Dizajna Algoritama
sections.screenshot_description: Oče Ambrose raspravlja o moralnoj neutralnosti AI i etici algoritama.
sections.content: Oče Ambrose ističe da je umjetna inteligencija 'moralno neutralna', ali naglašava potrebu za oprezom i razboritošću u njezinoj primjeni. Podijelio je razgovor s osobom iz Silicijske doline koja je otkrila kako su algoritmi velikih tehnoloških tvrtki (poput Amazona) dizajnirani da iskorištavaju najranjivije korisnike – one s najmanje novca, ali najvećom sklonošću zaduživanju. Oče Ambrose to naziva 'zlostavljanjem' i 'užasnim', jer je motivacija za stvaranje takvih algoritama profit, bez obzira na to 'koga potuku ili čije živote uništavaju'. Stoga, katolici i svi koji razmišljaju o korištenju ovih tehnologija moraju osigurati da služe 'pravom cilju', a ne samo profitu.
sections.subtitle_en: Moral Neutrality of AI and Ethical Implications of Algorithm Design
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Ambrose discusses the moral neutrality of AI and the ethics of algorithms.
sections.content_en: Father Ambrose points out that artificial intelligence is 'morally neutral', but emphasizes the need for caution and prudence in its application. He shared a conversation with a person from Silicon Valley who revealed how the algorithms of large technology companies (like Amazon) are designed to exploit the most vulnerable users – those with the least money, but the greatest inclination toward debt. Father Ambrose calls this 'abuse' and 'horrible', because the motivation for creating such algorithms is profit, regardless of 'whom they beat down or whose lives they destroy'. Therefore, Catholics and all who are considering the use of these technologies must ensure that they serve the 'right goal', and not just profit.

sections.subtitle: Tehnologija u Životima Djece: Izazovi Kulturne Angažiranosti
sections.screenshot_description: Oče Ambrose govori o dilemi davanja iPhonea djeci.
sections.content: Oče Ambrose ponavlja svoje osobno stajalište da djeci ne bi trebalo davati iPhone do osamnaeste godine, iako priznaje da je to izazovno za roditelje zbog pritiska vršnjaka. On razmatra dilemu između izoliranja djece od kulture i odgovornog angažmana s njom. Naglašava da je potrebno duboko promišljati o posljedicama pojedinačnih odluka o primjeni i korištenju tehnologija, jer su to 'važne odluke u svakom trenutku'.
sections.subtitle_en: Technology in the Lives of Children: Challenges of Cultural Engagement
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Ambrose speaks about the dilemma of giving an iPhone to children.
sections.content_en: Father Ambrose repeats his personal position that children should not be given an iPhone until the age of eighteen, although he admits that it is challenging for parents because of peer pressure. He considers the dilemma between isolating children from culture and responsible engagement with it. He emphasizes that it is necessary to deeply reflect on the consequences of individual decisions about the application and use of technologies, because these are 'important decisions at every moment'.

sections.subtitle: Granice AI u Učionici: Ljudski Edukator je Nezamenjiv
sections.screenshot_description: Oče Ambrose objašnjava zašto AI ne može zamijeniti ljudske učitelje.
sections.content: Na Benovo pitanje o granicama AI-ja u učionici, Oče Ambrose izražava snažno protivljenje zamjeni osobnog obrazovanja umjetnom inteligencijom na bilo kojoj razini – osnovnoj, srednjoj ili čak sveučilišnoj. On definira obrazovanje kao 'vođenje iz tame u svjetlo, iz neznanja u znanje', što zahtijeva ljudsko biće. Učitelj je poput nekoga tko 'uzme za ruku' učenika, pokazuje mu što zna i zajedno traže istinu. Stroj, naglašava, nikada ne može preuzeti tu ulogu ljudskog vodstva i formacije.
sections.subtitle_en: Limits of AI in the Classroom: The Human Educator is Irreplaceable
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Ambrose explains why AI cannot replace human teachers.
sections.content_en: To Ben's question about the limits of AI in the classroom, Father Ambrose expresses strong opposition to the replacement of personal education with artificial intelligence at any level – primary, secondary, or even university. He defines education as 'leading from darkness into light, from ignorance into knowledge', which requires a human being. A teacher is like someone who 'takes by the hand' the student, shows him what he knows, and together they seek the truth. A machine, he emphasizes, can never take over that role of human guidance and formation.

sections.subtitle: AI kao Pomoćnik u Pripremi Nastavnika, Ne u Izravnoj Poduci Učenika
sections.screenshot_description: Oče Ambrose objašnjava da AI treba pomagati nastavnicima, a ne podučavati učenike.
sections.content: Oče Ambrose precizira ulogu AI-ja kao alata koji pomaže ljudskim nastavnicima u obavljanju njihovog posla, a ne kao sredstva za izravnu poduku učenika. Kao primjer navodi virtualni program Instituta Evermode za nastavnike. Predviđa da bi AI mogla djelovati kao 'osobni agent za učenje' za nastavnike, pomažući im da procijene jesu li razumjeli sadržaj videozapisa i što je za njih bilo važno. Na taj način, AI može osigurati da su nastavnici dobro pripremljeni za podučavanje, što je ključno za odrasle, zauzete ljude. Međutim, on naglašava da se takav pristup ne bi smio replicirati u učionici za djecu ili mlade.
sections.subtitle_en: AI as an Assistant in Teacher Preparation, Not in Direct Instruction of Students
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Ambrose explains that AI should help teachers, and not teach students.
sections.content_en: Father Ambrose specifies the role of AI as a tool that helps human teachers in performing their job, and not as a means for direct instruction of students. As an example, he cites the virtual program of the Institut Evermode for teachers. He predicts that AI could act as a 'personal learning agent' for teachers, helping them to assess whether they have understood the content of the videos and what was important for them. In this way, AI can ensure that teachers are well-prepared for teaching, which is crucial for adult, busy people. However, he emphasizes that such an approach should not be replicated in the classroom for children or youth.

sections.subtitle: Analogija AI-ja s Catena Aurea: Alat za Pripremu, Ne Zamjena za Čovjeka
sections.screenshot_description: Oče Ambrose povlači paralelu između AI-ja i Catena Aurea.
sections.content: Oče Ambrose povlači zanimljivu analogiju između umjetne inteligencije i *Catena Aurea* svetog Tome Akvinskog, koju naziva 'tehnologijom umjetne inteligencije iz trinaestog stoljeća'. Kao svećenik, koristi alate (poput računala ili *Catena Aurea*) za istraživanje i pripremu propovijedi, gdje može pronaći što su sveti Ivan Zlatousti ili sveti Augustin rekli o određenom biblijskom odlomku. Ti alati mu pomažu u pripremi, ali on je taj koji propovijeda. Slično tome, AI može pomoći nastavnicima da nauče vjeru i budu dobro pripremljeni, ali učitelj je taj koji učenicima prenosi tko je Isus Krist, što su sakramenti i kako milost utječe na život. AI je 'oštar alat', ali 'nikad ne može zamijeniti čovjeka'.
sections.subtitle_en: AI Analogy with Catena Aurea: A Tool for Preparation, Not a Replacement for a Human
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Ambrose draws a parallel between AI and Catena Aurea.
sections.content_en: Father Ambrose draws an interesting analogy between artificial intelligence and the *Catena Aurea* of Saint Thomas Aquinas, which he calls 'thirteenth-century artificial intelligence technology'. As a priest, he uses tools (like a computer or the *Catena Aurea*) for research and sermon preparation, where he can find what Saint John Chrysostom or Saint Augustine said about a specific biblical passage. These tools help him in preparation, but he is the one who preaches. Similarly, AI can help teachers learn the faith and be well prepared, but the teacher is the one who conveys to the students who Jesus Christ is, what the sacraments are, and how grace affects life. AI is a 'sharp tool', but 'it can never replace a human'.

sections.subtitle: Nade za Katoličko Obrazovanje: Umrežavanje i Škole Bez Ekrana
sections.screenshot_description: Oče Ambrose izražava nadu za budućnost katoličkog obrazovanja, uključujući škole bez ekrana.
sections.content: Na pitanje o svojim nadama s foruma Builders AI i za budućnost katoličkog obrazovanja, Oče Ambrose ističe vrijednost umrežavanja s 'najoštrijim alatima' – kreativnim i marljivim ljudima koji rade na dobrobiti Kraljevstva Božjeg. Za katoličko obrazovanje, njegova najveća nada, iako zvuči neobično u kontekstu AI-ja, jest za 'škole bez ekrana'. Vjeruje da će djeca koja odrastaju bez stalne izloženosti ekranima biti najbolje opremljena za suočavanje s budućim izazovima. Ova vizija, iako kontraintuitivna s obzirom na temu konferencije, odražava njegovu duboku zabrinutost za autentičnu ljudsku formaciju.
sections.subtitle_en: Hopes for Catholic Education: Networking and Screen-Free Schools
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Ambrose expresses hope for the future of Catholic education, including screen-free schools.
sections.content_en: To the question about his hopes from the Builders AI forum and for the future of Catholic education, Father Ambrose highlights the value of networking with 'the sharpest tools' – creative and hardworking people who work for the benefit of the Kingdom of God. For Catholic education, his greatest hope, although it sounds unusual in the context of AI, is for 'screen-free schools'. He believes that children who grow up without constant exposure to screens will be best equipped to face future challenges. This vision, although counterintuitive considering the theme of the conference, reflects his deep concern for authentic human formation.

sections.subtitle: Završne Riječi i Zahvale
sections.screenshot_description: Ben zahvaljuje Ocu Ambroseu na razgovoru.
sections.content: Ben se zahvaljuje Ocu Ambroseu na njegovom vremenu i inspirativnom razgovoru, zaključujući ovu sekciju podcasta.
sections.screenshot_description_en: Ben thanks Father Ambrose for the conversation.
sections.content_en: Ben thanks Father Ambrose for his time and inspiring conversation, concluding this section of the podcast.

iterations.theme_en: The role of artificial intelligence in Catholic education: Opportunities, challenges, and the primacy of human formation
